_comment: Ordered list of parameters to walk through. Edit freely: add, remove, reorder. Each entry is one knob/switch/matrix cell. 'id' must be unique. 'instruction' is shown verbatim to the user.

parameters.name: Oscillator Type
parameters.instruction: Select a different OSCILLATOR TYPE (rotate the Type encoder, e.g. Basic Waves → Superwave)

parameters.name: Oscillator Wave
parameters.instruction: Tweak the WAVE knob (OSCILLATOR section)

parameters.name: Oscillator Timbre
parameters.instruction: Tweak the TIMBRE knob (OSCILLATOR section)

parameters.name: Oscillator Shape
parameters.instruction: Tweak the SHAPE knob (OSCILLATOR section)

parameters.name: Filter Cutoff
parameters.instruction: Tweak the CUTOFF knob (FILTER section)

parameters.name: Filter Resonance
parameters.instruction: Tweak the RESONANCE knob (FILTER section)

parameters.name: Filter Amount
parameters.instruction: Tweak the AMOUNT knob that controls envelope-to-filter (labeled 'Filter Amt' on the device — bipolar, goes negative and positive)

parameters.name: Envelope Attack
parameters.instruction: Tweak the ATTACK knob (ENVELOPE section)

parameters.name: Envelope Decay
parameters.instruction: Tweak the DECAY knob (ENVELOPE section)

parameters.name: Envelope Sustain
parameters.instruction: Tweak the SUSTAIN knob (ENVELOPE section)

parameters.name: LFO Rate
parameters.instruction: Tweak the LFO RATE knob

parameters.name: Cycling Env Rise
parameters.instruction: Tweak the RISE knob (CYCLING ENV section)

parameters.name: Cycling Env Fall
parameters.instruction: Tweak the FALL knob (CYCLING ENV section)

parameters.name: Cycling Env Hold
parameters.instruction: Tweak the HOLD knob (CYCLING ENV section)

parameters.name: Cycling Env Amount
parameters.instruction: Tweak the AMOUNT knob (CYCLING ENV section)

parameters.name: Cycling Env Rise Shape
parameters.instruction: Hold SHIFT and turn the RISE knob (accesses Rise shape — likely bipolar: exp curve / linear / log curve)

parameters.name: Cycling Env Fall Shape
parameters.instruction: Hold SHIFT and turn the FALL knob (accesses Fall shape — likely bipolar: exp curve / linear / log curve)

parameters.name: Arp/Seq Rate
parameters.instruction: Tweak the RATE knob (ARP/SEQ section)

parameters.name: Glide
parameters.instruction: Tweak the GLIDE knob (top left, near Pitch/Glide)

parameters.name: Master Volume
parameters.instruction: Tweak the MASTER VOLUME knob (top right)

parameters.name: LFO Sync
parameters.instruction: Toggle LFO SYNC (Shift + LFO Rate — or wherever your firmware exposes LFO sync on/off). LOW = Off, HIGH = On.

parameters.name: Arp/Seq Sync
parameters.instruction: Toggle ARP/SEQ SYNC on/off. LOW = Off, HIGH = On.

parameters.name: Paraphonic
parameters.instruction: Toggle PARAPHONIC on/off. LOW = Off (Mono), HIGH = On (Paraphonic).

parameters.name: Hold
parameters.instruction: Toggle HOLD on/off. LOW = Off, HIGH = On.
